title: Chernihiv: Missile launch detected
description: Russia launched a missile attack on the Dnipro, on the infrastructure. A rescue operation is currently underway at the site. All services are involved, helping people with everything they need. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known that five people have died. My condolences to family and friends. Twenty-nine people were injured as a result of this strike. There was a Russian attack on Zaporizhzhia today, on an ordinary minibus. Three people died due to...
description_en: Russia launched a missile attack on the Dnipro, on the infrastructure. A rescue operation is currently underway at the site. All services are involved, helping people with everything they need. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known that five people have died. My condolences to family and friends. Twenty-nine people were injured as a result of this strike. There was a Russian attack on Zaporizhzhia today, on an ordinary minibus. Three people died due to...
description_uk: Росія завдала ракетного удару по Дніпру, по інфраструктурі. На місці зараз триває рятувальна операція. Залучені всі служби, допомагають людям усім необхідним. На жаль, станом на зараз відомо, що пʼять людей загинули. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Двадцять девʼять людей поранені внаслідок цього удару. Був сьогодні російський удар по Запоріжжю, по звичайній маршрутці. Троє людей загинули через...

title: Casualties reported
description: Paris morgues are overcrowded due to the record heat AP writes that after the record heat in Paris, there are no more places in the morgues. One of the owners of the funeral parlor says that he receives hundreds of calls and again answers: there are no places. In France, at least 1,000 additional deaths have already been counted in the three hottest days. Most of the dead are people over 65 years old. To free up space, bodies are taken to other...
description_en: Paris morgues are overcrowded due to the record heat AP writes that after the record heat in Paris, there are no more places in the morgues. One of the owners of the funeral parlor says that he receives hundreds of calls and again answers: there are no places. In France, at least 1,000 additional deaths have already been counted in the three hottest days. Most of the dead are people over 65 years old. To free up space, bodies are taken to other...
description_uk: Морги Парижа переполнены из-за рекордной жары AP пишет, что после рекордной жары в Париже закончились места в моргах. Один из владельцев похоронного бюро говорит, что принимает сотни звонков и снова отвечает: мест нет. Во Франции уже насчитали минимум 1000 дополнительных смертей за три самых жарких дня. Большинство погибших - люди старше 65 лет. Чтобы освободить места, тела вывозят в другие...

description: 82 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 29 (from 18:00 on June 28), the enemy attacked 108 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions of Bryansk, Kursk, Millerovo, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, TOT of the Donetsk region; Chauda, ​​Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...

title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Putin acknowledges gas station queues, fuel shortages amid Ukrainian strikes as Russia works to stabilize supply. Russian President Vladimir Putin on June 28 acknowledged gas station queues in Russia and shortages of various fuel types as Ukrainian strikes continue to increase pressure on Moscow's energy resources.
description_en: Putin acknowledges gas station queues, fuel shortages amid Ukrainian strikes as Russia works to stabilize supply. Russian President Vladimir Putin on June 28 acknowledged gas station queues in Russia and shortages of various fuel types as Ukrainian strikes continue to increase pressure on Moscow's energy resources.

title: Spokesman of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Georgy Tykhy in X: POV:...

description: Spokesman of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Georgy Tykhy in X: POV: you sound like you are about to win the war (for the fifth year in a row) RIL: started an aggressive war, hoping for a quick victory; failed to achieve any goal after losing 1.4 million people in over 4 years; your slow advances stop; war returns to your territory. Looks like a winner!
description_en: Spokesman of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Georgy Tykhy in X: POV: you sound like you are about to win the war (for the fifth year in a row) RIL: started an aggressive war, hoping for a quick victory; failed to achieve any goal after losing 1.4 million people in over 4 years; your slow advances stop; war returns to your territory. Looks like a winner!
description_uk: Речник МЗС Георгій Тихий у Х: ПОВ: звучиш так, ніби ось-ось виграєш війну (п’ятий рік поспіль) РІЛ: розпочав агресивну війну, сподіваючись на швидку перемогу; не досяг жодної мети після втрати 1,4 мільйона людей за понад 4 роки; твої повільні просування зупиняються; війна повертається на твою територію. Виглядає переможно!

title: Poland wants Germany to pay victims of Nazism Der Spiegel writes that...
title_en: Poland wants Germany to pay victims of Nazism Der Spiegel writes that...
title_uk: Польща хоче, щоб Німеччина виплатила жертвам нацизму Der Spiegel пише, що...
description: Poland wants Germany to pay victims of Nazism Der Spiegel writes that Warsaw wants the surviving victims of the Nazi occupation to receive 10,000 zlotys (about 2,330 euros) per hour. Previously, Poland demanded more than 1.3 trillion euros in reparations from Berlin for the damage caused during the Second World War. Now they have changed their tactics and are asking for money not for the state, but for specific people who survived...
description_en: Poland wants Germany to pay victims of Nazism Der Spiegel writes that Warsaw wants the surviving victims of the Nazi occupation to receive 10,000 zlotys (about 2,330 euros) per hour. Previously, Poland demanded more than 1.3 trillion euros in reparations from Berlin for the damage caused during the Second World War. Now they have changed their tactics and are asking for money not for the state, but for specific people who survived...
description_uk: Польша добивается от Германии выплат жертвам нацизма Der Spiegel пишет, что Варшава хочет, чтобы оставшиеся в живых жертвы нацистской оккупации получали по 10 тысяч злотых (около 2330 евро) в год. Раньше Польша требовала от Берлина более 1,3 трлн евро репараций за ущерб времен Второй мировой войны. Теперь там сменили тактику и просят деньги не для государства, а для конкретных людей, переживших...

title: Zaporizhzhia: Missile attack
description: 'On a Sunday morning' — Russia strikes Zaporizhzhia, injuring 8, including 2 children. Governor Ivan Fedorov reported the threat of guided aerial bomb strikes on Zaporizhzhia Oblast at 10:05 a.m. local time. Seventeen minutes later, he warned of incoming high-speed missiles targeting the oblast and the city of Zaporizhzhia.
description_en: 'On a Sunday morning' — Russia strikes Zaporizhzhia, injuring 8, including 2 children. Governor Ivan Fedorov reported the threat of guided aerial bomb strikes on Zaporizhzhia Oblast at 10:05 a.m. local time. Seventeen minutes later, he warned of incoming high-speed missiles targeting the oblast and the city of Zaporizhzhia.
